workflowInfo.workflowDescription: Generates a Liberty server dump for z/OSMF diagnostics

variable.name: WLP_USER_DIR
variable.label: WLP User Directory
variable.abstract: Liberty user directory containing server configuration
variable.description: The WLP_USER_DIR path for z/OSMF Liberty server

variable.name: WLP_BIN
variable.label: Liberty Binary Path
variable.abstract: Path to the Liberty wlp/bin directory
variable.description: Full path to the Liberty server binary

variable.name: DUMP_ARCHIVE
variable.label: Dump Archive Path
variable.abstract: Full path for the output dump zip file
variable.description: Where the dump zip file will be written

step.name: verifyLiberty
step.title: Verify Liberty Installation
step.description: Confirms the Liberty server binary exists before attempting to generate the dump
step.instructions: Verify that the Liberty binary exists at: ${instance-WLP_BIN}/server

template.inlineTemplate: #!/bin/sh ls -l ${instance-WLP_BIN}/server if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then echo "Liberty binary found at ${instance-WLP_BIN}/server" else echo "ERROR: Liberty binary not found at ${instance-WLP_BIN}/server" exit 1 fi

step.name: generateDump
step.title: Generate Liberty Server Dump
step.description: Runs the Liberty server dump command to capture diagnostics

step.name: verifyDump
step.title: Verify Dump Output
step.description: Confirms the dump file was created successfully
step.instructions: Verify the dump archive was created at: ${instance-DUMP_ARCHIVE}

template.inlineTemplate:
#!/bin/sh DUMP_DIR=/global/zosmf/ZOS31/data/logs/zosmfServer echo "Verifying dump output in $DUMP_DIR ..." ls -lt $DUMP_DIR | head -5
LATEST=$(ls -t $DUMP_DIR/zosmfServer.dump-*.zip 2>/dev/null | head -1) if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then echo "SUCCESS: Latest dump file found:" ls -l $LATEST else echo "ERROR: No dump zip found in $DUMP_DIR" exit 1 fi
